evidence.decolonization: Module treats literary-origin songs as Ukrainian cultural circulation with explicit authorship, provenance limits, and resistance to imperial anonymization.
evidence.learner_surface: Ukrainian-facing source, activities, generated MDX, and resources avoid internal IDs, English leakage, AI/process language, and writer-facing grading register.
evidence.review: Claude Opus 4.8 review task review-folk-m20-pisni-literaturnoho-pokhodzhennia found one dangling-fragment blocker and one learner-facing CEFR-label issue; both were fixed before scoring. Follow-up corpus-hammer removed Klymovsky and Petrenko verbatim fragments that did not match local verify_quote.
evidence.source_hygiene: Only short corpus-matched fragments are embedded for Skovoroda and Shevchenko; Klymovsky and Petrenko are handled through title/provenance discussion; no fabricated hosted reading page is used.
